AI quizzes that make studying easy

![](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif)

# Gizmo: AI Tutor

AI flashcards & quizzes

Free · In-App Purchases

- ![](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif)

- ![](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif)

- ![](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif)

- ![](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif)

- ![](https://apps.apple.com/assets/artwork/1x1.gif)


iPhone, iPad

Gizmo is the easiest way to learn

\- AI Import: Import anything and turn it into flashcards fast! You can convert Quizlet, Anki, YouTube, PDF, Notes, PowerPoint, and more!
\- Scan notes: Scan handwritten notes to turn them into flashcards and quizzes
\- Quizzing: Fun quizzes make learning feel like a game
\- Spaced repetition and active recall: Gizmo uses the most advanced techniques to help you remember what you learn
\- Pre-made decks: Quickly find 1,000,000+ free public flashcards made by other students
\- Organised: Organise your studying with files and decks
\- Gamified: Make study into a game!

\- Free flashcards
\- AI learning assistant / AI tutor
\- Active recall quizzes
\- Spaced repetition
\- Leaderboards and study games
\- Simple and minimalistic aesthetic
\- Scan pictures and photos to make flashcards
\- Shared decks
\- Multiple choice questions
\- Written questions

As seen on TikTok and Instagram Terms of use - https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

out of 5

# App Privacy

The developer, **Save All**, indicated that the app’s privacy practices may include handling of data as described below. This information has not been verified by Apple. For more information, see the [developer’s privacy policy](https://gizmo.ai/privacy).

To help you better understand the developer’s responses, see [Privacy Definitions and Examples](https://apps.apple.com/ye/iphone/story/id1539235847).

Privacy practices may vary based, for example, on the features you use or your age. [Learn More](https://apps.apple.com/ye/iphone/story/id1538632801)

### Data Not Collected

The developer does not collect any data from this app.

The developer, **Save All**, indicated that the app’s privacy practices may include handling of data as described below. For more information, see the [developer’s privacy policy](https://gizmo.ai/privacy).

The developer does not collect any data from this app.

AI Flashcard maker: Turns youtube videos, PDFs, notes powerpoints into flashcards - just click import.

AI Tutor: Teaches you anything, solves homework problems, and teaches you how to answer exam questions

Decided to try this. Was able to scan a foreign language vocabulary page and it created 75 cards right away. Wow... this is easier than typing them one by one! Then... after 5 questions it would freeze. Back out and try again, same 5 questions. Can't do anything else. I did get very good practice with these 5 words but that's only because it wouldn't do anything else. Had high hopes that were quickly squashed.

7 people found this review helpful

Save All

March 15, 2026

We’re sorry to hear that you’re experiencing issues with Gizmo. Could you please contact us at support@gizmo.ai through the app so we can assist you directly? Rest assured, our team is continually working to improve the app and make it even more helpful for your studies.

I'm gonna say, this is a really good app, you can insert pictures, files, whatever to create cards out of, which is very handy, HOWEVER. The only thing holding this app back from being the best study app is the fact that it's very slow and have limitations from how many you can import, I know you need money, but why lock a very useful thing behind a pay wall and make us only able to use it like, three times per day?

729 people found this review helpful

I don't know if it's only me but the app keeps bugging and lagging. In my own experience, even though I waited for 30 minutes, there's still no progress. It just keeps on loading forever and this makes me frustrated.
